meta_desc: Inflatable spider tent for events. Unique design, ultra-fast set-up, windproof. Available in several sizes and colours.
hero_colored: The ideal solution for your events
hero_p1: Our inflatable spider tents combine a unique design with remarkable ease of installation. Available in diameters from 4m to 10m, they can be adapted to all your outdoor events.
hero_p2: Made from UV- and water-resistant materials, our tents provide reliable protection from the elements during your events.
why_title: Why choose our Inflatable Spider Tents?
why1_desc: Quick installation in under 30 minutes. You don't need any heavy equipment - it's all done with a built-in blower.
why2_desc: Made from UV- and water-resistant materials, our tents provide reliable protection from the elements during your events.
why3_desc: Choose the ideal size for your event: from 4m to 10m in diameter. Our tents are ideal for festivals, outdoor film screenings and trade shows.
tech1_desc: Inflatable feet for exceptional stability, even on uneven ground and in windy conditions.
tech2_desc: Printing of logos and graphics on the roof, feet, PVC feet, zip covers and walls.
tech3_desc: Options for walls (standard, door, window) and awnings with banner, feet, customisable PVC and fabric.
tech4_desc: Carry bag, pumps (electric and manual), sand/water bags, LED light, repair kit, anchoring system, floor mat, connection system.
app1_desc: Create a unique covered space for your outdoor screenings.
app2_desc: An original, robust structure for festivals and concerts.
app3_desc: Elegant exhibition stand for your trade fairs and shows.
app4_desc: VIP areas, refreshment points, reception areas.
faq_q1: What is an inflatable spider tent?
faq_a1: An inflatable spider tent is a unique inflatable structure, ideal for outdoor events such as film screenings, festivals or sporting events. These tents have inflatable legs to ensure stability, even in windy conditions, and their distinctive shape resembles a spider's web.
faq_q2: What are the advantages of an inflatable spider tent?
faq_a2: Inflatable spider tents offer many advantages for outdoor events: quick set-up (less than 15 minutes), exceptional stability thanks to inflatable legs, UV and water resistance, great mobility thanks to low weight, and complete customisation.
faq_q3: How long does it take to set up an inflatable spider tent?
faq_a3: Our inflatable spider tents are designed for quick set-up in under 30 minutes. You don't need any heavy equipment - it's all done with a built-in blower. The whole process can be done by one person.
cta_title: Request a quote for your Spider Tent
cta_desc: Contact us for a personalised quote tailored to your needs.
